access_log_settings.description: Configures logging for API Gateway stage, specifying the destination ARN and format for access logs.

api_id.description: ID of the associated API Gateway v2 resource that this stage belongs to; must be an existing API ID.

auto_deploy.description: Determines whether changes deployed to the API are automatically available in the stage; must be true or false.

client_certificate_id.description: The ID of the client certificate used for mutual TLS authentication in the stage.

default_route_settings.description: Defines the default route settings for the API Gateway stage, including configurations for throttling and data logging.
default_route_settings.type: list(object({data_trace_enabled: optional(bool),detailed_metrics_enabled: optional(bool),logging_level: optional(string),throttling_burst_limit: optional(number),throttling_rate_limit: optional(number)}))

deployment_id.description: Specifies the ID of the deployment to associate with the stage. Must correspond to an existing deployment in the API Gateway.

description.description: Specifies the stage's description, providing context or details about its purpose or usage.

name.description: Specifies the name of the API Gateway stage. Must be unique within the API Gateway and can contain alphanumeric characters, hyphens, and underscores.

route_settings.description: Defines custom settings for routes in the stage, including throttling and data logging configurations.
route_settings.type: list(object({data_trace_enabled: optional(bool),detailed_metrics_enabled: optional(bool),logging_level: optional(string),route_key: string,throttling_burst_limit: optional(number),throttling_rate_limit: optional(number)}))

stage_variables.description: Key-value pairs to configure stage-specific settings, passed to the integration backend; must be defined as a map.

tags.description: Key-value pairs to categorize and organize the stage, typically for cost allocation, access control, or resource management.
